headline: Is Deere (DE) Still Attractive After Recent Pullback And DCF Upside Signals
summary: Wondering if Deere at around US$559.73 is still a solid entry or if most of the value is already on the table? This breakdown will help you frame that question clearly. The share price has pulled back with a 3.1% decline over the past week and a 5.7% decline over the past month, even though the stock shows returns of 19.9% year to date and 20.1% over 1 year. Recent coverage around Deere has focused on its role as a key capital goods name and how investor sentiment can shift as expectations...
